source.name: Hetionet v1.0
source.citation: Himmelstein DS, et al. Systematic integration of biomedical knowledge prioritizes drugs for repurposing. eLife. 2017. DOI: 10.7554/eLife.26726

narrative_embedding.note: 16-dim narrative embeddings are SYNTHETIC: per-report deterministic vectors biased toward (signal) or away from (non-signal) the historical_signal_centroid. The notebook uses similar_to(r.narrative_vec, [centroid]) to score each report's narrative against the centroid.

notes: Compounds, genes, pathways, side effects, and the three edge
sets are an EXACT slice of Hetionet v1.0 (no synthetic edges).
adr_reports.csv is SYNTHETIC: drawn from CcSE pairs in the
seeded by the prep-script --seed parameter. Use this as a
reproducible FAERS-shaped stream, not as real reports.
